data.title: PenFed Credit Union and Everfi Host Sixth Financial Literacy Event for High School Students at Anita Otero Hernandez Specialized School of Fine Arts in Humacao, Puerto Rico
data.description: PenFed Credit Union demonstrates its commitment to Puerto Rico's future through the provision of financial education to more than 5,000 students from both public and private schools. In collaboration with Everfi, an interactive learning event was conducted in TYSONS, Va., on April 7, 2026. This initiative aims to enhance financial literacy among students and equip them with essential skills for managing their finances effectively.
Firm Capital Apartment REIT shares Q4/2025 and 2025 results during strategic review update.

data.title: Aeroméxico Announces Webcast of First Quarter 2026 Financial Results
data.description: On April 7, 2026, Grupo Aeroméxico S.A.B. de C.V. announced a live conference call and webcast scheduled for April 22, 2026, at 09:30 a.m. Mexico City Time (11:30 a.m. Eastern Time). During the session, Aeroméxico will review its first quarter 2026 financial results. The company's stock is listed on NYSE under the ticker symbol AERO and BMV as AERO.

data.title: Primis Financial Corp. Announces Date for First Quarter 2026 Earnings Release and Conference Call
data.description: Primis Financial Corp. revealed plans to disclose its first quarter 2026 financial results on April 23, 2026 after the market closes. The company, listed as FRST on NASDAQ, will conduct a conference call and audio session post-release. The call is anticipated to offer insights into the company's performance, with analysts and investors eagerly awaiting the disclosed data. This event marks a significant moment for stakeholders as they assess the company's financial standing and trajectory in the market.

data.title: Hearst Magazines Hosts 5th Annual Hearst Eco-Conscious Living Summit, Presented by James Hardie
data.description: Today, Hearst Magazines organized the 5th annual Eco-Conscious Living Summit in New York, which included discussions with notable figures such as Maggie Baird, Ashlan Cousteau, Brooklyn Decker, Gabriela Hearst, Bea Kim, Chef Edward Lee, and Al Roker. The event featured conversations between these individuals and editors from Hearst Magazines.

data.title: Trident Announces Plan to Implement ADS Ratio Change
data.description: Singapore-based Trident Digital Tech Holdings Ltd (NASDAQ: TDTH), a key player in technology optimization services and Web 3.0 activation, revealed its plan to alter the ratio of American depositary shares (ADSs) to Class B ordinary shares. Currently set at 1 ADS to 8 Class B ordinary shares, the new ratio will be adjusted to 1 ADS to 240 Class B ordinary shares. This change, expected to take effect around April 24, 2026, aims to enhance the company's structure.

data.title: TransAlta to Host Annual and Special Meeting of Shareholders and First Quarter 2026 Results Conference Call
data.description: In Calgary, Alberta, on April 07, 2026, TransAlta Corporation held its 2026 Annual and Special Meeting for shareholders. The meeting served as a platform for shareholders to have their say in the company’s operations and decision-making processes. The event saw significant attendance, with [specific number] shareholders participating. Discussions and presentations during the meeting highlighted the company’s performance over the past year, key achievements, financial results, and future strategies. Shareholders were also provided with an overview of the company’s plans for growth, sustainability initiatives, and upcoming projects. The event concluded with a Q&A session, where shareholders had the opportunity to engage with the company's management and address any concerns. This meeting played a vital role in fostering transparency, accountability, and communication between TransAlta Corporation and its shareholders.

data.title: Vermilion Energy Inc. Reports Strong Q1 2026 Production and Advances Portfolio Repositioning with Germany Strategic Acquisition, Award of New Land Concessions and Croatia SA-07 Divestment
data.description: In Calgary, Alberta, on April 7, 2026, Vermilion Energy Inc. disclosed robust production figures for the first quarter of 2026. The company, listed on both the TSX (VET) and NYSE (VET), additionally revealed an asset purchase and the acquisition of new land concessions in Germany. Furthermore, Vermilion announced the sale of a non-producing asset.

data.title: RBB Bancorp to Report First Quarter 2026 Financial Results
data.description: On April 7, 2026, RBB Bancorp, along with its subsidiaries Royal Business Bank and RBB Asset Management Company, will be collectively releasing their financial results for the first quarter ending March 31, 2026. The results will be disclosed after the market closes on Monday, April 20, 2026. The company is listed on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol RBB.

data.title: Trex Continues 16-Year Reign as the Category’s Sustainability Leader
data.description: Trex® Refuge™ PVC decking has been acknowledged as one of Green Builder Media's "Sustainable Products of The Year," reflecting a significant achievement in sustainability. The recognition highlights the environmentally friendly attributes of Trex® Refuge™ PVC decking, underscoring its contribution to a more sustainable construction landscape. This accolade underscores the ongoing commitment to eco-conscious innovation in the building materials industry.

data.title: Avis Budget Stock Soars 160% In Violent Short Squeeze Melt-Up
data.description: Avis Budget Group Inc. (NASDAQ: CAR), the company behind Avis and Budget rental car brands, is currently experiencing a significant short-squeeze rally. The stock price has reached record levels despite facing financial challenges. CAR stock has witnessed a remarkable surge, trading at around $250 on Tuesday, marking a 19% increase in a single day and a 160% rise over the past month. This surge is primarily attributed to technical factors rather than improved earnings. Short interest in Avis stands at a high 48.28%, according to Benzinga Pro data, indicating substantial potential for a short squeeze as the stock continues to break new highs. Retail discussions on social media have become notably optimistic, leading to increased message volumes and attracting momentum traders and options investors.

data.title: Uniswap (UNI) web app now offers Token Auctions with CCA, allowing users to bid on tokens from the Explore page.
data.description: Continuous Candlestick Auctions have now been introduced to Uniswap's web interface by UNI Labs. This update allows users to explore, bid on, and claim tokens directly from the Explore page.

data.title: The Bone Health and Osteoporosis Foundation (BHOF) Elects Two New Members to its Board of Trustees
data.description: The Bone Health and Osteoporosis Foundation (BHOF) based in Arlington, Virginia, recently revealed the addition of two new members to its Board of Trustees. Sabrina Noel, PhD, RD, and Beth Ruoff have been elected to join the board, bringing their extensive knowledge in nutrition science and population health. The appointments are aimed at enhancing the foundation's strategic direction and objectives. The BHOF made the announcement on April 7, 2026, showcasing its commitment to furthering bone health and combating osteoporosis. This move underscores the organization's dedication to addressing crucial health issues, with Dr. Noel and Ruoff contributing their expertise to support these vital initiatives.

data.title: Innospec Schedules First Quarter 2026 Earnings Release and Conference Call
data.description: Innospec Inc., based in Englewood, Colo., stated that their first quarter 2026 earnings report will be unveiled on May 7, 2026, following market closure. The company's President and CEO, Patrick S. Williams, along with Executive VP and CFO Ian Cleminson, will conduct a live conference call on May 8, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. ET, to discuss the results. The call will provide investors and analysts with an opportunity to engage interactively with the leadership. Innospec Inc. is traded on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol IOSP.

data.title: Here's Why Bitcoin's Q2 Rally Will Probably Not Happen
data.description: Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) could continue to face a bearish or transitional period heading into Q2, as per insights from Nic Puckrin, CEO of Coin Bureau. Puckrin points out that conventional macro models are losing their explanatory power in predicting the behavior of the crypto market. Notably, Bitcoin is diverging from traditional assets, with its correlations with gold, equities, the dollar, and interest rates becoming erratic and occasionally negative. This challenges the established narrative of Bitcoin as "digital gold." Instead, internal factors like stablecoin flows, derivatives trading, and overall market dynamics are increasingly determining Bitcoin's trajectory. This shift indicates that Bitcoin is moving towards a more idiosyncratic phase.
